scripts.build: powershell -Command "if (!(Test-Path dist)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path dist }; Copy-Item index.html dist; Copy-Item style.css dist; Copy-Item main.js dist; Copy-Item ar-core.js dist; Copy-Item pipeline-loader.js dist; Copy-Item ui.js dist; Copy-Item utils.js dist; Copy-Item pipeline-data.json dist; Copy-Item public dist -Recurse"
